name: Master Hanzi
short_description: One day, soldiers disappeared from a Chinese city, and now they are being searched for in an underground military base in the desert. However, after intensive research, it turned out that the results were anything but positive.
detailed_description:
For millennia, symbols have told stories... They speak of wisdom, culture, and ancient traditions. Yet mastering them seems impossible... With Master Hanzi, the impossible becomes tangible. Discover Chinese characters not as dry theory, but as a vibrant adventure! Dive into an interactive world where every character becomes a story. Draw, listen, understand, and experience the art of language up close! Learn the characters step by step and master Chinese characters, without any pressure! Learn from mistakes, grow with every lesson, and feel the success when you conquer a challenging character! It’s not just a game... It’s a journey. A journey into the art, soul, and heart of a unique culture. You will learn the characters in the right context, narrated by native Chinese speakers, at your own pace. Through Comprehensible Input, you will understand each character from its context. In addition to Comprehensible Input in the right context, the game offers:

*) A shadowing system to follow along with native speakers.

*) A flashcard system to practice reading, writing, listening to tones, and pronunciation.

*) Pronunciation assistance for the characters in English.

*) The option to learn both simplified and traditional characters as well as Pinyin.

*) Detailed explanations for every learned character.

*) An unbeatable value offer.
